sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9076" key="a)nisotoixe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῐσο-τοιχέω</orth>, <sense id="n9076.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be out of trim, lean over to one side,</tr_> metaph. from a ship, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg006:p.108D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Epict.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.108D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
